_comment: Maps PRD keywords to worked-example files. The stuck detector matches keywords against the PRD text + failing test output and surfaces the best-scoring example.

examples.summary: SQL tokenizer + recursive-descent parser. Handles SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE + WHERE. Shows the critical alias-vs-keyword detection pattern.
Canonical argparse subcommand dispatch. One-shape rule: subcommands are callables, mapped by name via a COMMANDS dict. Prevents the minivc anti-pattern (init.run() on a function).

Tree-walking interpreter for a toy language. Lexer → Parser → Interpreter in SEPARATE files. Operator precedence via method-call nesting (parse_expr → parse_add → parse_mul → parse_atom). Environment with outer-pointer for lexical scope. visit_<NodeType> dispatch. CRITICAL: do NOT stub Interpreter in cli.py — write it in interpreter.py.
